title: dracocephalum ovalifolium
intro: Dracocephalum ovalifolium, also known as Oval-leaved Dragonhead or Blue Dragon, is a perennial flowering plant native to Central Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Dracocephalum ovalifolium include relieving pain and inflammation, as well as possessing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
